title: Bhuto Purbo
overview: On a stormy evening, two strangers arrive at Bibhutibhushan's ancestral home. As rain pours outside, the men exchange mysterious stories of a greedy woman's spirit bound to her jewels, a mystic caught between power and peace, and a conman whose perfect crime takes a dark turn.
